testcase.name: Alumna::Orchestrator .run with empty rule list returns the context unchanged
Alumna::Orchestrator when all rules return continue calls every rule in registration order
Alumna::Orchestrator when all rules return continue leaves ctx.error nil
Alumna::Orchestrator when all rules return continue leaves ctx.phase unchanged
Alumna::Orchestrator when a rule returns stop sets ctx.error to the ServiceError
Alumna::Orchestrator when a rule returns stop sets ctx.phase to Error
Alumna::Orchestrator when a rule returns stop does not call rules after the stopping rule
Alumna::Orchestrator when a rule returns stop uses the first stop error
Alumna::Orchestrator early exit when ctx.result is set in Before phase stops processing further before-rules
Alumna::Orchestrator early exit when ctx.result is set in Before phase does not set ctx.error
Alumna::Orchestrator early exit when ctx.result is set in Before phase preserves the result
Alumna::Orchestrator early exit does not apply in After phase continues through all rules even when result is set
Alumna::Schema initialization starts empty
Alumna::Schema #field normalizes :str symbol
Alumna::Schema #field accepts FieldType enum
Alumna::Schema #field defaults required to true
Alumna::Schema #field stores lengths
Alumna::Schema format accepts :email, :url, :uuid
Alumna::Schema format accepts enum directly and capitalized symbols
Alumna::Schema format allows nil
Alumna::Schema format raises for unknown format
Alumna::Schema required_on normalizes array of symbols
Alumna::Schema required_on normalizes mixed symbols and enums
Alumna::Schema required_on accepts nil
Alumna::Schema required_on raises for unknown method
Alumna::Schema helpers set correct types and forward options
Alumna::Schema chaining and builder returns self
Alumna::Schema chaining and builder builds via block and preserves order
Alumna::Schema error paths for type raises for unknown type
Alumna::Schema validator integration (kept from your original) validates format when given as symbol
Alumna::Schema required fields passes when the required field is present
Alumna::Schema required fields fails when a required field is absent
Alumna::Schema required fields fails when a required field is explicitly null
Alumna::Schema required fields does not report an error for a missing optional field
Alumna::Schema required fields reports the canonical 'is required' message
Alumna::Schema required_on requires title on create
Alumna::Schema required_on requires title on update
Alumna::Schema required_on does not require title on patch
Alumna::Schema required_on does not require title on get
Alumna::Schema required_on requires title when method is nil (backward compatibility)
Alumna::Schema required_on validates constraints only when field is present on patch
Alumna::Schema Str type accepts a string
Alumna::Schema Str type rejects an integer
Alumna::Schema Str type rejects a bool
Alumna::Schema Int type accepts an integer
Alumna::Schema Int type rejects a string
Alumna::Schema Int type rejects a bool
Alumna::Schema Float type accepts a float
Alumna::Schema Float type accepts an integer (coercible)
Alumna::Schema Float type rejects a string
Alumna::Schema Bool type accepts true
Alumna::Schema Bool type accepts false
Alumna::Schema Bool type rejects a string
Alumna::Schema Bool type rejects an int
Alumna::Schema Nullable type accepts any value when present
Alumna::Schema Nullable type does not require the field
Alumna::Schema min_length passes when length == min
Alumna::Schema min_length passes when length > min
Alumna::Schema min_length fails when length < min
Alumna::Schema min_length uses singular 'character' for 1
Alumna::Schema max_length passes when length == max
Alumna::Schema max_length passes when length < max
Alumna::Schema max_length fails when length > max
Alumna::Schema max_length uses singular 'character' for 1
Alumna::Schema Email format accepts a valid email
Alumna::Schema Email format rejects missing @
Alumna::Schema Url format accepts https URL
Alumna::Schema Url format rejects plain domain
Alumna::Schema Uuid format accepts a lowercase UUID
Alumna::Schema Uuid format rejects missing hyphens
Alumna::Schema skipping length/format checks when type is wrong reports only the type error
Alumna::Schema edge cases requires a Nullable field when missing, but accepts null
Alumna::Schema edge cases Int rejects float values
Alumna::Schema edge cases Float rejects bool
Alumna::Schema edge cases returns multiple errors for one field
Alumna::Schema edge cases ignores fields not defined in schema
Alumna::Schema edge cases accepts uppercase UUID
Alumna::Schema edge cases rejects URL with trailing space
Alumna::Schema edge cases required_on implies presence even when required: false
Router integration unknown path returns 404 for a path with no registered service
Router integration method not allowed returns 405 for POST with an id segment
Router integration authentication rule returns 401 when the authorization header is missing
Router integration authentication rule returns 401 when the authorization header is wrong
Router integration authentication rule returns 401 with an error body
Router integration verb → method mapping GET /items maps to find (returns an array)
Router integration verb → method mapping POST /items maps to create (returns 201)
Router integration verb → method mapping GET /items/:id maps to get
Router integration verb → method mapping PUT /items/:id maps to update
Router integration verb → method mapping PATCH /items/:id maps to patch
Router integration verb → method mapping DELETE /items/:id maps to remove
Router integration response Content-Type defaults to application/json
Router integration response Content-Type returns application/msgpack when Accept header requests it
Router integration query param filtering passes query params to the service and filters results
Router integration validation errors returns 422 when the request body fails schema validation
Router integration validation errors returns an error body with field-level details
Router integration service-level 404 returns 404 when getting a non-existent record
Router integration serializer negotiation falls back to app default when Content-Type is missing
Router integration serializer negotiation uses input serializer for output when Accept is missing
Router integration serializer negotiation resolves input and output serializers independently
Router integration path matching returns 404 for trailing slash on id segment
Router integration path matching returns 404 for nested path segments
Router integration body parsing treats missing body as empty hash, not nil
Router integration body parsing returns 413 when body exceeds limit
Router integration malformed body returns 400 for invalid JSON
Router integration malformed body returns 400 for JSON array instead of object
Router integration malformed body returns 413 when a chunked body exceeds the limit (covers IO::Error rescue)
Router integration Alumna::Http::LimitedIO reads up to the limit
Router integration Alumna::Http::LimitedIO raises IO::Error when the limit is exceeded
Router integration Alumna::Http::LimitedIO raises on write because it is read-only
Alumna::Http::JsonSerializer #content_type returns application/json
Alumna::Http::JsonSerializer encode/decode round-trip preserves a String value
Alumna::Http::JsonSerializer encode/decode round-trip preserves an Int64 value
Alumna::Http::JsonSerializer encode/decode round-trip preserves a Float64 value
Alumna::Http::JsonSerializer encode/decode round-trip preserves a true Bool value
Alumna::Http::JsonSerializer encode/decode round-trip preserves a false Bool value
Alumna::Http::JsonSerializer encode/decode round-trip preserves a nil value
Alumna::Http::JsonSerializer encode/decode round-trip preserves multiple fields in a single hash
Alumna::Http::JsonSerializer encode/decode round-trip returns an empty hash when the input hash is empty
Alumna::Http::JsonSerializer #encode (Array) encodes an array of hashes to a JSON array
Alumna::Http::JsonSerializer #encode (Array) encodes an empty array to a JSON empty array
Alumna::Http::JsonSerializer #decode with malformed input raises ServiceError for invalid JSON
Alumna::Http::JsonSerializer #decode with malformed input raises ServiceError for an empty body
Alumna::Http::MsgpackSerializer #content_type returns application/msgpack
Alumna::Http::MsgpackSerializer encode/decode round-trip preserves a String value
Alumna::Http::MsgpackSerializer encode/decode round-trip preserves an Int64 value
Alumna::Http::MsgpackSerializer encode/decode round-trip preserves a Float64 value
Alumna::Http::MsgpackSerializer encode/decode round-trip preserves a true Bool value
Alumna::Http::MsgpackSerializer encode/decode round-trip preserves a false Bool value
Alumna::Http::MsgpackSerializer encode/decode round-trip preserves a nil value
Alumna::Http::MsgpackSerializer encode/decode round-trip preserves multiple fields of mixed types in a single hash
Alumna::Http::MsgpackSerializer encode/decode round-trip returns an empty hash when the input hash is empty
Alumna::Http::MsgpackSerializer #encode (Array) encodes an array of hashes to non-empty bytes
Alumna::Http::MsgpackSerializer #encode (Array) encodes an empty array without raising
Alumna::Http::MsgpackSerializer #decode with malformed input returns an empty hash for garbage bytes
Alumna::Http::MsgpackSerializer #decode with malformed input raises ServiceError for an empty body
Alumna System Integration initially returns empty array
Alumna System Integration creates with 201 and auto-generated id
Alumna System Integration ignores client-supplied id on create
Alumna System Integration lists all records
Alumna System Integration filters find by query params
Alumna System Integration gets a specific record
Alumna System Integration returns 404 for unknown get
Alumna System Integration update replaces entire record
Alumna System Integration patch merges fields without sending required title
Alumna System Integration update and patch cannot change id
Alumna System Integration returns 404 for update on missing id
Alumna System Integration deletes and returns removed:true
Alumna System Integration delete non-existent returns removed:false
Alumna System Integration rejects missing token
Alumna System Integration rejects wrong token
Alumna System Integration auth header is case-insensitive
Alumna System Integration requires title
Alumna System Integration validates min_length
Alumna System Integration validates max_length
Alumna System Integration validates type
Alumna System Integration allows optional content to be omitted
Alumna System Integration validation runs on update but not on get
Alumna System Integration returns validation details structure
Alumna System Integration after-rule adds X-Request-ID header
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #create returns the record with an auto-assigned id
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #create auto-increments ids across successive calls
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #create overrides any id supplied in the input data with its own counter
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #create persists the record so it can be retrieved afterwards
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #find returns an empty array when the store is empty
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #find returns all records when no params are given
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #find filters records by a single query param
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #find applies AND semantics when multiple params are given
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #find returns an empty array when no records match the filter
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #get returns the record for a known id
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #get returns nil for an unknown id
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #get returns nil when ctx.id is nil
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #update replaces the record entirely and returns it with the same id
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #update drops fields from the old record that are absent from the new data
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #update persists the replacement so a subsequent get reflects it
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #update raises a 404 error when the id does not exist
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #update raises a 400 error when ctx.id is nil
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #patch merges the new data onto the existing record
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #patch persists the merge so a subsequent get reflects it
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #patch raises a 404 error when the id does not exist
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #patch raises a 400 error when ctx.id is nil
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #remove deletes the record and returns true
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #remove makes the record unretrievable after deletion
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #remove returns false when the id does not exist
Alumna::MemoryAdapter #remove raises a 400 error when ctx.id is nil
Alumna::MemoryAdapter concurrency assigns unique sequential ids under concurrent creates
Alumna::MemoryAdapter concurrency does not lose updates under concurrent patches to the same record
Alumna::MemoryAdapter concurrency allows concurrent finds while writing
Service::Base symbol-friendly registration API calls the single-value overload for before (line 15)
Service::Base symbol-friendly registration API accepts a single Symbol and normalizes via capitalize
Service::Base symbol-friendly registration API accepts a single Symbol for after (line 19)
Service::Base symbol-friendly registration API accepts an array of Symbols
Service::Base error boundary in call_method wraps a raised Exception with message into 500 (line 96)
Service::Base error boundary in call_method uses 'Unexpected error' when Exception.message is nil
Service#dispatch execution order runs before rules, then the service method, then after rules
Service#dispatch execution order sets ctx.phase to After before calling the service method
Service#dispatch execution order populates ctx.result before after rules run
Service#dispatch only: scoping runs a method-scoped rule only for its registered method
Service#dispatch only: scoping does not run a method-scoped rule for any other method
Service#dispatch global vs method-specific rule ordering runs global before rules ahead of method-specific before rules
Service#dispatch global vs method-specific rule ordering runs global after rules ahead of method-specific after rules
Service#dispatch when a before rule stops does not call the service method
Service#dispatch when a before rule stops does not run after rules
Service#dispatch when a before rule stops sets ctx.error to the error from the stopping rule
Service#dispatch when a before rule sets ctx.result (early exit) does not call the service method
Service#dispatch when a before rule sets ctx.result (early exit) does not run after rules
Service#dispatch when a before rule sets ctx.result (early exit) preserves the result set by the before rule
Service#dispatch when the service method raises a ServiceError sets ctx.error with the correct status
Service#dispatch when the service method raises a ServiceError sets ctx.phase to Error
Service#dispatch when the service method raises a ServiceError does not run after rules
Alumna::ServiceError initialization stores message, status, and details
Alumna::ServiceError initialization defaults status to 400 and details to empty hash
Alumna::ServiceError initialization is an Exception
Alumna::ServiceError initialization can be raised and rescued
Alumna::ServiceError .bad_request returns 400 with custom message
Alumna::ServiceError .bad_request accepts details hash
Alumna::ServiceError .unauthorized defaults message to Unauthorized and status 401
Alumna::ServiceError .unauthorized allows custom message
Alumna::ServiceError .forbidden defaults to Forbidden 403
Alumna::ServiceError .forbidden allows custom message
Alumna::ServiceError .not_found defaults to Not found 404
Alumna::ServiceError .not_found allows custom message
Alumna::ServiceError .unprocessable returns 422 with message and details
Alumna::ServiceError .unprocessable defaults details to empty hash
Alumna::ServiceError .internal defaults to Internal server error 500
Alumna::ServiceError .internal allows custom message
